subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Truth! Consider the tribulations of Jesus, Son of Mary, the afflictions of the Prince of Martyrs, and the martyrdom of John, son of Zachariah [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق در بلایای عیسی بن مریم و مصائب سیدالشهداء و شهادت یحیی بن زکریا و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @growth of the Cause, @spiritual transformation
